initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_category,
    SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
    SUM(cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity,
    SUM(cr_return_quantity) / NULLIF(SUM(cs_quantity), 0) AS return_rate
FROM 
    catalog_returns
JOIN 
    item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
    catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    i_category
ORDER BY 
    return_rate DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT item.i_category,
       SUM(catalog_returns.cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
       SUM(catalog_sales.cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity,
       SUM(catalog_returns.cr_return_quantity) / NULLIF(SUM(catalog_sales.cs_quantity), 0) AS return_rate
FROM catalog_returns
JOIN item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
                  AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY item.i_category
ORDER BY return_rate DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  item.i_category,
  SUM(catalog_returns.cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
  SUM(catalog_sales.cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity,
  SUM(catalog_returns.cr_return_quantity) / NULLIF(SUM(catalog_sales.cs_quantity), 0) AS return_rate
FROM
  catalog_returns
  JOIN item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE
  date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY
  item.i_category
ORDER BY
  return_rate DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    item.i_category,
    SUM(catalog_returns.cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity,
    SUM(catalog_returns.cr_return_quantity) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(catalog_sales.cs_quantity), 0) AS return_rate
FROM 
    catalog_returns
    JOIN item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    item.i_category
ORDER BY 
    return_rate DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    item.i_category,
    SUM(catalog_returns.cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity,
    SUM(catalog_returns.cr_return_quantity) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(catalog_sales.cs_quantity), 0) AS return_rate
FROM 
    catalog_returns
    JOIN item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    item.i_category
ORDER BY 
    total_return_quantity / NULLIF(total_sold_quantity, 0) DESC
LIMIT 100

  JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
